decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 stability over new features
decisions.context: Multiple critical bugs in E2 (chart persistence ENG-8946, zoom crashes ENG-8866, session loops ENG-8293) are eroding Signal quality. Users can't trust saved configs or chart interactions—core to 'Decisions Captured'.

arguments.for: North Star depends on reliable signal capture. Broken charts = broken decisions. 3 critical E2 bugs affect daily users. Aligns with 'Nail the Core' pillar.
arguments.against: Delays Canvas/Python Rules roadmap. Feature velocity slows. Competitive pressure from other APM tools pushing ML/AI features.

decisions.title: Accelerate Python Rules GA to Q2 2026
decisions.context: ENG-9146 (orphaned jobs), ENG-9147 (eval errors), ENG-8953 (polish) suggest Python Rules nearing production-ready. K2 pipeline (ENG-9104) shows demand for programmable rules. This is 'Build the Moat' territory.
decisions.blockedBy: Docker infra (ENG-9001) incomplete; Keycloak HA migration (ENG-7813) delays auth for Python runner

arguments.for: Differentiated capability vs competitors. Enables complex decision logic (embed deeper with eng teams). 3 polish tickets signal maturity. K2 mission shows enterprise demand.
arguments.against: Infra not stable (orphaned jobs, CPU spikes ENG-8158). Premature GA risks brand damage. Canvas should come first per roadmap sequencing.

decisions.title: Sunset legacy Explore (E1) by end of Q2 2026
decisions.context: 26% of eng tickets are E2 feature parity/bugs (zoom, pan ENG-5674, asset recognition ENG-5699, timestamps ENG-7552). Dual maintenance tax slows both. E2 adoption unclear from signals.

arguments.for: Halves maintenance burden. Forces E2 quality improvements. Frees 15-20% eng capacity for moat-building. Clear strategic direction.
arguments.against: E2 has critical bugs (session loops, chart persistence). Forced migration could churn power users. Need E2 feature completeness first (refresh button ENG-6386, drag-to-plot ENG-9116).

decisions.title: Invest in data pipeline reliability as platform primitive
decisions.context: Parquet import bugs (ENG-9150), MemTable filtering issues (ENG-9137), channel list redundant calls (ENG-9140), K2 pipeline (ENG-9104) all point to data layer brittleness. Platform is foundation for all product pillars.

arguments.for: Every product (Explore, Canvas, Rules, Edge) depends on data reliability. Corrupt signals = bad decisions = broken North Star. Foundational for 'Embed Deeper' (customers trust their data).
arguments.against: Less visible than feature work. Hard to quantify ROI. Could divert from customer-facing innovations like Canvas/Ask SIFT.

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy eng ticket triage week—30 active issues spanning E2 bugs, infra, and Python Rules polish. Zero customer-facing launch signals. Execution mode, not strategic mode.
alerts: No North Star measurement signals detected—cannot track 'Decisions Captured Per Customer'
7 critical bugs in Explore V2 with no clear prioritization framework
Zero Canvas/Ask SIFT progress signals—moat-building at risk
Keycloak migration (ENG-7813) blocking Python Rules GA timeline
Amplitude instrumentation issues (ENG-9088, ENG-9145, ENG-8158) limit product analytics visibility

events.title: Decision: Explore V2 Stability Sprint
events.description: Commit to 2-week sprint fixing ENG-8946, ENG-8866, ENG-8293 or declare E2 not production-ready

events.title: Decision: Python Rules GA Readiness Gate
events.description: Go/no-go on Q2 GA based on infra completion (ENG-9001, ENG-7813) and error handling maturity

events.title: Keycloak HA GovCloud Cutover
events.description: ENG-7813 completion unblocks Python Rules auth and resolves session loop bugs

events.title: Python Rules Beta Feature Freeze
events.description: Lock scope for GA release. Polish only (ENG-8953, ENG-9147) after this date.

events.title: Data Pipeline Reliability Sprint Kickoff
events.description: Address Parquet imports (ENG-9150), MemTable filtering (ENG-9137), channel list perf (ENG-9140)

events.title: North Star Instrumentation Design Review
events.description: Define how to measure 'Decisions Captured Per Customer' across Explore/Canvas/Rules/Edge

events.title: Decision: E1 Sunset Timeline
events.description: Commit to E1 deprecation plan or extend dual-maintenance through Q3

events.title: Q1 Strategy Review: Pillars Health Check
events.description: Assess Nail/Embed/Moat progress. Adjust Q2 roadmap based on E2 stability, Python Rules readiness, Canvas delays.

events.title: Canvas Private Beta Launch (at risk)
events.description: No eng signals detected. Risk of Q1 miss. Critical for 'Build the Moat' pillar.

events.title: Python Rules GA Launch
events.description: Target GA if infra/auth resolved by Apr. Key differentiator for enterprise customers.

events.title: Explore E1 Deprecation (proposed)
events.description: End E1 support, consolidate eng effort on E2. Requires Apr 2 decision commitment.

events.title: Sift Edge Pilot Program Kickoff
events.description: No current signals. Critical for 'Embed Deeper' with edge/OT customers.
